name: NexCampus v2.3.6
changelog: Code Lab side-by-side layout — editor and output now side by side, no scrolling
Auto-graded coding challenges — 8 Python challenges with test cases and instant scoring
Interactive mind map tool — canvas-based, drag nodes, edit labels, export PNG
Procedural planet textures with atmospheric glow + lens flare for Solar System
Neon Tokyo theme — cyberpunk electric blue + magenta
Midnight Purple theme — deep violet with neon accents
Sidebar search — find any tool instantly, press Esc to clear
All 11 code lab projects fixed — no more input() errors
Solar System: 900 stars, vignette, dashed orbits, multi-layer sun, nebula clouds
JavaScript runs in browser — no Node.js needed
Seamless self-update — no sudo, no terminal
